name: EGO POWER+ 56V 21" Push Mower (Tool Only)
description: EGO's entry-level push mower. No battery included, so it's the cheapest way into EGO mowing if you already own 56V batteries. Delivers up to 45 minutes of mowing time with a 5.0Ah battery (sold separately).

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 21" Push Mower Kit (6.0Ah)
description: A mid-range push mower kit that includes a 6.0Ah battery and charger. Delivers up to 55 minutes of runtime and 6 ft-lbs of torque. Seven cutting height positions give you more precise control.
features: Up to 55 minutes runtime with included 6.0Ah battery

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 21" Touch Drive Self-Propelled Mower Kit (7.5Ah)
description: A self-propelled mower with EGO's Touch Drive technology -- a simple dial that controls speed from 0.9 to 3.1 MPH. No bail bar to squeeze. The 7.5Ah battery gives you up to 60 minutes of mowing time.
features: Touch Drive self-propelled with speed dial (0.9-3.1 MPH)

name: EGO POWER+ 56V Select Cut 21" Self-Propelled Mower Kit (7.5Ah)
description: EGO's best-selling mower. The Select Cut multi-blade system has three interchangeable lower blades (mulching, high-lift bagging, and extended runtime) so you can optimize for the task. Touch Drive self-propelled with dial control.
features: Select Cut multi-blade system with 3 interchangeable lower blades
Touch Drive self-propelled with dial control
Folds flat for compact upright storage

name: EGO POWER+ 56V Select Cut XP 21" Self-Propelled Mower Kit (10.0Ah)
description: The top-of-the-line Select Cut XP delivers 8.3 ft-lbs of torque -- exceeding the power of gas mowers. The massive 10.0Ah battery provides up to 75 minutes of cutting time. This is the mower for large, thick lawns.
features: 8.3 ft-lbs of torque -- exceeds gas power
10.0Ah battery for up to 75 minutes runtime

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 21" Self-Propelled Mower Kit (2x 4.0Ah)
description: A self-propelled mower that ships with two 4.0Ah batteries for up to 65 minutes of runtime. Variable speed self-propel from 0.9 to 3.1 MPH gives you the right pace for any terrain.
features: Two 4.0Ah batteries included for extended runtime

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 1300 Series 30" Self-Propelled Mower Kit
description: A commercial-grade 30-inch walk-behind mower for large lawns. The super composite deck is lightweight, rust-proof, and dent-resistant. Uses two batteries via Peak Power technology.
features: Super composite deck -- no rust, no dents
Peak Power technology with two batteries

name: EGO POWER+ 42" Z6 Zero-Turn Riding Mower Kit (6x 6.0Ah)
description: EGO's original zero-turn mower delivers the equivalent of 22 horsepower. Combines up to six 56V batteries for up to 1.5 acres per charge. Features dual blade cutting system with customizable blade speed.
features: Up to 8 MPH with 3 driving modes

name: EGO POWER+ 42" Z6 Zero-Turn Mower with e-STEER (2x 10.0Ah + 4x 6.0Ah)
description: The e-STEER model replaces lap bars with a steering wheel and advanced electronics for pinpoint handling. Same 42-inch deck but with the power equivalent of 24 horsepower and 2.0 acres per charge.
features: e-STEER steering wheel with advanced electronics
Color display, LED lights, USB-C charging

name: EGO POWER+ 52" Z6 Zero-Turn Riding Mower Kit (6x 10.0Ah)
description: The largest EGO mower with a 52-inch fabricated steel deck. Delivers 27 HP equivalent power and covers up to 3.0 acres per charge. Built for large properties and commercial landscaping.
features: 27 HP equivalent -- strongest in the lineup
Up to 3.0 acres per charge with 6x 10.0Ah batteries
Color screen, USB-C, LED lights, cup holder

name: EGO POWER+ 42" T6 Lawn Tractor Kit (6x 6.0Ah)
description: A traditional lawn tractor form factor with EGO's battery technology. Dual brushless belt-free cutting motors deliver the equivalent of 21 horsepower. Tows up to 600 lbs for yard work trailers.
features: Digital LCD display, LED lights, USB, Bluetooth

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 15" POWERLOAD String Trimmer with Carbon Fiber Split Shaft Kit (2.5Ah)
description: EGO's POWERLOAD technology loads trimmer line automatically -- just insert, press a button, and the motor winds the line for you. The carbon fiber split shaft is lightweight and breaks down for easy storage.
features: Carbon fiber split shaft -- lightweight and durable

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 15" POWERLOAD String Trimmer with Carbon Fiber Shaft Kit (4.0Ah)
description: The upgraded POWERLOAD trimmer with a one-piece carbon fiber shaft for even better strength and lighter weight. The 4.0Ah battery provides up to 50 minutes of trimming.
features: One-piece carbon fiber shaft -- lifetime warranty
Up to 50 minutes runtime with 4.0Ah battery
Variable speed trigger with speed lock

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 15" String Trimmer & 530 CFM Blower Combo Kit (2.5Ah)
description: The best value in the EGO lineup -- a string trimmer and blower combo kit that gets you started with two essential yard tools for under $300. Includes a 2.5Ah battery and charger.
features: 15-inch string trimmer with Rapid Reload head
Both tools share the same 56V battery

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 15" POWERLOAD String Trimmer & 615 CFM Blower Combo Kit (2.5Ah)
description: An upgraded combo kit with POWERLOAD trimmer and a more powerful 615 CFM blower. The POWERLOAD auto-winds trimmer line so you never have to manually thread it again.
features: POWERLOAD 15-inch string trimmer with aluminum shaft
Both tools share the same 56V battery

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 530 CFM Handheld Blower Kit (2.5Ah)
description: The entry-level EGO blower with 530 CFM. Plenty of power for clearing a driveway, patio, or small yard. Up to 75 minutes runtime with the included 2.5Ah battery.

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 615 CFM Handheld Blower Kit (4.0Ah)
description: A step up in power with 615 CFM and 170 MPH for moving heavier, wet leaves. The variable speed dial lets you adjust airspeed from 200-480 CFM for precision blowing.

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 650 CFM Handheld Blower Kit (5.0Ah)
description: The most popular EGO blower. 650 CFM and 180 MPH with a metal impeller for durability. Up to 90 minutes runtime on the 5.0Ah battery. Moves serious leaves.

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 765 CFM Handheld Blower Kit (5.0Ah)
description: The most powerful handheld blower in the EGO lineup with 765 CFM and 200 MPH. Rivals backpack gas blowers in power while weighing under 10 lbs with battery.

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 880 CFM Handheld Blower (Tool Only)
description: The flagship EGO blower with 880 CFM and 200 MPH. This is a true gas-replacement blower that outperforms most gas handhelds. Tool only -- battery sold separately.

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 600 CFM Backpack Blower Kit (7.5Ah)
description: A backpack blower that puts the battery weight on your back for all-day comfort. The 600 CFM output handles large properties and the 7.5Ah battery provides extended runtime.

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 14" Chainsaw Kit (2.5Ah)
description: The entry-level EGO chainsaw with a 14-inch bar. Perfect for limbing, pruning, and cutting firewood. At 11.4 lbs it's light enough for extended use without fatigue.

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 16" Chainsaw Kit (2.5Ah)
description: The mid-size chainsaw with a 16-inch bar and 11,000 RPM chain speed. Auto chain tensioning eliminates manual adjustments, and the higher RPM delivers cleaner, faster cuts than the 14-inch model.
features: Up to 130 cuts on a 4x4 per charge (2.5Ah)

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 18" Chainsaw Kit (5.0Ah)
description: The workhorse chainsaw in EGO's lineup. The 18-inch bar handles serious cutting tasks and delivers up to 300 cuts on a 4x4 with the included 5.0Ah battery. Equivalent to a 45cc gas chainsaw.
features: Up to 300 cuts on a 4x4 per charge (5.0Ah)
Auto chain tensioning and automatic oiler
LED work light and digital display

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 18" Chainsaw with 2500W Motor (Tool Only)
description: The top-of-the-line chainsaw with a 2500W motor delivering chain speeds up to 22 m/s. Matches a 50cc gas chainsaw and delivers 330 cuts on a 4x4 with a 6.0Ah battery (sold separately). Digital display and LED work light.
features: 2500W motor -- most powerful in the lineup
22 m/s chain speed for fast, clean cuts
Digital display shows battery level and chain speed

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 12" Top Handle Chainsaw Kit (4.0Ah)
description: A professional top-handle chainsaw designed for arborists and tree care. The compact 12-inch bar and top-handle design work well for overhead cuts and working from a lift or ladder.
features: Battery holster for carrying a spare

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 24" Hedge Trimmer Kit (2.5Ah)
description: A 24-inch hedge trimmer with 1-inch cut capacity. The dual-action blades deliver clean cuts at 3,000 SPM. Includes a 2.5Ah battery and charger for immediate use.

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 26" Hedge Trimmer (Tool Only)
description: A 26-inch hedge trimmer with carbon fiber rail for reduced weight. The longer blade covers more with each pass, and the 1.2-inch cut capacity handles thicker branches.
features: Carbon fiber rail for light weight

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 8" Multi-Head Edger Kit (2.5Ah)
description: A standalone edger built on EGO's Multi-Head system. The 8-inch blade cuts edges up to 3 inches deep. Includes the power head and edger attachment, plus a 2.5Ah battery and charger.
features: Adjustable cutting depth up to 3 inches
Guide wheel with depth adjustment knob

name: EGO POWER+ 56V Multi-Head Power Head with Carbon Fiber Shaft (Tool Only)
description: The motor unit for EGO's Multi-Head system. Buy this once, then add interchangeable attachments for trimming, edging, pole sawing, hedge trimming, and more. The carbon fiber shaft has a lifetime warranty.
features: Works with all EGO Multi-Head attachments
Carbon fiber shaft with lifetime warranty

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 10" Pole Saw Attachment for Multi-Head System
description: A 10-inch pole saw attachment for the EGO Multi-Head system. Reaches overhead branches without a ladder. The automatic oiler keeps the chain lubricated during extended use.

name: EGO POWER+ 8" Edger Attachment for Multi-Head System
description: An 8-inch edger attachment for the EGO Multi-Head system. Adds lawn edging capability to your power head without buying a separate tool.
features: Adjustable cutting depth up to 3 inches

name: EGO POWER+ 15" String Trimmer Attachment for Multi-Head System
description: A 15-inch string trimmer attachment for the EGO Multi-Head system. Converts your power head into a capable string trimmer for edging and weed control.
features: Compatible with all EGO trimmer line

name: EGO POWER+ 20" Hedge Trimmer Attachment for Multi-Head System
description: A 20-inch hedge trimmer attachment for the EGO Multi-Head system. Dual-action blades with 1-inch cut capacity for maintaining hedges and bushes.

name: EGO POWER+ 9.5" Cultivator Attachment for Multi-Head System
description: A cultivator attachment for the EGO Multi-Head system. Heavy-duty steel tines adjustable from 8 to 9.5 inches for tilling garden beds and mixing soil amendments.
features: Ideal for garden beds and flower beds

name: EGO POWER+ 12" Brush Cutter Attachment for Multi-Head System
description: A brush cutter attachment for tackling overgrown areas with thick vegetation and saplings up to 3/4-inch thick. The three-tooth steel blade powers through brush that a string trimmer can't handle.
features: Carbon fiber shaft with lifetime warranty

name: EGO POWER+ 56V Multi-Head Combo Kit: String Trimmer + Edger + Power Head (4.0Ah)
description: A complete Multi-Head starter kit with the power head, 16-inch carbon fiber string trimmer attachment, and edger attachment. One motor, two tools. Includes 4.0Ah battery and charger.
features: Power Head with carbon fiber shaft
Add more attachments to expand capability

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 10" Pole Saw Kit (2.5Ah)
description: A standalone pole saw (not Multi-Head) with a telescopic shaft for reaching high branches. The 10-inch bar handles limbs up to about 8 inches. LED cut line indicator shows exactly where the chain will cut.

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 21" Single-Stage Snow Blower (Tool Only)
description: A single-stage snow blower for clearing driveways and walkways. Peak Power technology combines the power of any two EGO 56V batteries. Clears up to a 10-car driveway with 8 inches of snow.
features: Peak Power with any two 56V batteries

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 21" Snow Blower with Steel Auger Kit (2x 5.0Ah)
description: The upgraded snow blower with a steel auger that cuts through ice and packed snow 50% faster. Includes two 5.0Ah batteries and a dual-port charger for extended clearing.
features: Steel auger cuts through ice 50% faster
Clears 12-car driveway with 8 inches of snow
Two 5.0Ah batteries and dual-port charger included

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 24" Two-Stage Self-Propelled Snow Blower (Tool Only)
description: The two-stage snow blower handles deep, heavy snow with a 24-inch clearing width and 20-inch intake height. Self-propelled with variable speed and Peak Power technology. Clears an 18-car driveway.
features: Two-stage: auger feeds impeller for 40-foot throwing
Peak Power with any two 56V batteries

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 3200 PSI Pressure Washer Kit (2x 6.0Ah)
description: The most powerful cordless pressure washer on the market. 3,200 PSI at 1.2 GPM handles driveways, decks, siding, and vehicles. Includes foam cannon, 5 nozzles, and two 6.0Ah batteries.
features: ECO, High, and Turbo modes via wand display
Up to 60 minutes runtime with 2x 6.0Ah batteries

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 3200 PSI Pressure Washer (Tool Only)
description: The same 3,200 PSI pressure washer without batteries. A great option if you already own EGO 56V batteries. Same performance, lower entry price.
features: Peak Power technology with two batteries

name: EGO POWER+ 56V Nexus 3000W Portable Power Station Kit (2x 7.5Ah)
description: A portable power station that uses your EGO 56V batteries as a generator alternative. Delivers 2,000W continuous with 3,000W peak through 3 AC outlets and 4 USB ports. Pure sine wave output is safe for sensitive electronics.
features: Uses up to four EGO 56V batteries
No gas, no fumes, no maintenance

name: EGO POWER+ 56V Nexus 1400W Portable Power Station Kit (2x 6.0Ah)
description: A mid-range portable power station with 1,400W continuous output. Features USB-C Power Delivery at 100W for charging laptops. Supports up to four 56V batteries.

name: EGO POWER+ 56V Nexus Escape 400W Power Inverter (Tool Only)
description: A compact power inverter that sits directly on an EGO 56V battery. Provides 400W continuous for charging phones, running small appliances, or powering lights during an outage. The cheapest way to get portable power from your EGO batteries.
features: Mounts directly on any EGO 56V battery
Compact and portable -- take it anywhere
No battery included -- uses your existing EGO batteries

name: EGO POWER+ 56V Cordless Inflator (Tool Only)
description: A cordless inflator that handles everything from sports balls to 20-inch SUV tires in under a minute. Three modes: high-pressure, high-volume, and deflation.
features: Inflates SUV tires in under a minute

name: EGO POWER+ 56V Cordless Wet/Dry Vacuum (Tool Only)
description: A cordless wet/dry vacuum with 85 CFM suction and 60 inches of water lift. Built for cleaning the garage, workshop, or car interior. Onboard storage for accessories and a self-cleaning filter function.
features: 85 CFM suction / 60 inches of water lift

name: EGO POWER+ 12" Snow Shovel Attachment for Multi-Head System
description: A power snow shovel attachment for the EGO Multi-Head system. Clears light snow from walkways, steps, and small areas where a full snow blower is overkill.
features: Powered snow removal for light snow

name: EGO POWER+ 21" Rubber Broom Attachment for Multi-Head System
description: A powered rubber broom attachment for sweeping driveways, patios, and garage floors. The rubber bristles are effective on rough surfaces and won't damage them.
features: Effective on concrete, pavers, and asphalt

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 5.0Ah ARC Lithium Battery
description: The 5.0Ah battery is the sweet spot in EGO's lineup -- enough capacity for mowing a medium lawn or blowing a large driveway. The fuel gauge shows remaining charge at a glance.
features: ARC Lithium technology for consistent power
Keep Cool cell technology extends life

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 7.5Ah ARC Lithium Battery
description: The 7.5Ah battery for extended runtime. Ideal for mowing larger lawns or running power-hungry tools like the chainsaw and pressure washer for extended sessions.

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 10.0Ah ARC Lithium Battery
description: The largest battery in EGO's lineup at 10.0Ah. Provides the longest possible runtime for any EGO tool. Used with the Select Cut XP mower for 75+ minutes of mowing.
features: Recommended for Select Cut XP and zero-turn mowers

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 2.5Ah ARC Lithium Battery
description: The lightest and most affordable EGO battery. Best for handheld tools like trimmers, blowers, and hedge trimmers where weight matters more than runtime.

name: EGO POWER+ 56V Rapid Charger
description: The rapid charger charges a 2.5Ah battery in about 40 minutes. Features active cooling to keep the battery at optimal temperature during charging for longer battery life.

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 700W Turbo Charger
description: The fastest EGO charger at 700W. Charges a 2.5Ah battery in just 30 minutes. Active cooling and intelligent battery management extend battery life during fast charging.
